CustomField.description: The First Rent Reset Date, with prior business day adjustments, will apply to the initial floating rent periods until the next maturity reset date. Based on this date, the actual interest rate from the index will be used for the floating rent calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The First Rent Reset Date, with prior business day adjustments, will apply to the initial floating rent periods until the next maturity reset date. Based on this date, the actual interest rate from the index will be used for the floating rent calculation.
CustomField.label: First Rent Rate Reset Date
